---
title: "Home Ranges"
format:
  dashboard:
    logo: "images/logo.png"
    orientation: columns
---

## Column {width="35%"}

Placeholder text for column 1

```{r, loadpackages}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r, printstarwars}
head(starwars)
```

## Column {width="65%"}

### Row {Height="10%}

Placeholder text for column 2, row 1

### Row {Height="70%}

GLM

![](../output/glm/earlywinter_map.png)

Random forest

![](../output/randomforest/earlywinter_map.png)

### Row {Height="20%}

GLM

![](../output/glm/earlywinter_auc.png)

Random forest

![](../output/randomforest/earlywinter_auc.png)
